name: account.list.ldap
title: Status Account List LDAP
description: A status report of the client's Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (LDAP) accounts.

payloadkeys.title: Status item value.
payloadkeys.content: A list of status values for the LDAP accounts.

subkeys.content: A status report of the client's LDAP account details.

subkeys.title: Unique identifier of the account.
subkeys.content: The unique identifier for the account.

subkeys.title: Indicates removal of the account.
subkeys.content: If `true`, the account is removed and the status item object only contains this key and the `identifier` key.

subkeys.title: Identifier of the declaration that installed the account.
subkeys.content: The identifier of the declaration that installed the account. Only present if a declaration installed the account.

subkeys.title: Account hostname
subkeys.content: The server host name for the account.

subkeys.title: Server Port
subkeys.content: The server port for the account.

subkeys.title: Account username
subkeys.content: The user name for the account.

subkeys.title: Is account enabled
subkeys.content: A Boolean value that indicates whether the account is enabled for use with the Contacts app.
